emergency.title: Emergency
emergency.subtitle: EMERGENCY - INTENSIVE CARE
emergency.description: Over the years, Vinmec has conducted emergency care and saved critically ill patients; successfully handling many major emergency events.

section1.title: 24/7 Operation
section1.desc: All days of the week, including Saturdays, Sundays and holidays throughout the year

section2.title: Reputation & Quick Response
items: Medical staff trained comprehensively and specialized in many areas of emergency resuscitation with international certifications such as ACLS, PALS, FCCS
Supporting the Emergency Department is a team of professional secretaries and multilingual interpreters
All specialized ambulances are equipped with modern systems including professional ventilators

section3.title: Professional Emergency Process
items: Patients are accurately assessed and classified according to the Australian Triage Scale
Patients receive specialized care with coordination from multiple specialty teams
The department has full emergency and treatment functions for emergency and urgent conditions
Vinmec Emergency Resuscitation Department also handles post-operative resuscitation

sub1.title: Rapid Response Team (RRT)
sub1.desc: To detect early signs of acute changes in patients, remotely prevent unwanted cardiac arrest events

sub2.title: Sepsis Management
sub2.desc: Early recognition of signs when patients have sepsis and septic shock

section5.title: Multidisciplinary Rounds
section5.desc: Daily, the Core team rounds on ICU patients, comprehensive treatment and care plans are discussed and agreed upon

section1.title: Multidisciplinary Emergency Examination and Treatment
items: Cardiac arrest emergency for patients with cardiac arrest, acute coronary syndrome

section2.title: Basic & Advanced Emergency Resuscitation
items: Emergency resuscitation from basic to advanced in many areas
Neurosurgical resuscitation: After brain tumor surgery, traumatic brain injury

section1.title: Separate Emergency Room System
section1.desc1: Separate emergency room system specialized for each specialty
section1.desc2: Negative pressure isolation room system meeting specific isolation requirements

cardiology.title: Cardiology
cardiology.subtitle: CARDIOLOGY CENTER
cardiology.description: Vinmec Cardiology Center is one of the leading heart centers in Vietnam, providing comprehensive diagnostic and treatment services for cardiovascular diseases.

section1.title: Leading Cardiology Center
section1.desc: Vinmec has a team of experienced cardiologists trained at world-leading medical centers

section3.title: Treatment Process
items: Screening and early diagnosis of cardiovascular diseases

sub1.title: Cardiac Catheterization Lab
sub1.desc: Equipped with the most modern DSA digital subtraction angiography system

sub2.title: Hybrid Operating Room
sub2.desc: Combining surgery and intervention in the same operating room

section5.title: Comprehensive Care
section5.desc: Patients are cared for from the diagnosis stage, treatment to functional rehabilitation

section1.title: Modern Intervention Room
section1.desc1: New generation DSA system with 3D angiography capability
section1.desc2: FFR system measuring coronary blood flow

section1.title: Modern Radiotherapy System

section1.title: Allergy Testing Laboratory
